targets.rawSql: SELECT status as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM sensors GROUP BY status

SELECT s.uid as "Identifiant", s.battery_level as "Batterie %", fz.name as "Zone", s.last_seen as "Dernière vue" FROM sensors s LEFT JOIN forest_zones fz ON s.zone_id = fz.id WHERE s.battery_level < 20 ORDER BY s.battery_level ASC

SELECT uid as "Identifiant", last_seen as "Dernière vue", ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - last_seen))/3600::numeric, 1) as "Heures hors ligne" FROM sensors WHERE last_seen < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours' OR last_seen IS NULL ORDER BY last_seen ASC NULLS FIRST
